
---
title: "HUMPBACK WHALE (<i>Megaptera novaeangliae</i>):"
subtitle: "(<i>Megaptera novaeangliae</i>):"
date: today
publication-date: 2050-01-01
date-format: "MMMM DD, YYYY"
citeproc: true
bibliography: ../assets/HUWH.yaml
csl: ../assets/apa.csl
author:
  - name: Danielle Cholewiak
    email: dani.cholewiak@noaa.gov
    orcid: 0000-0001-111-1111
    affiliations:
      - ref: 1
  - name: Beth Josephson
    email: charles.darwin@noaa.gov
    affiliations:
      - ref: 1
affiliations:
  - id: 1
    name: Northeast Fisheries Science Center
    department: National Marine Fisheries Service
    address: 166 Water Street
    city: Woods Hole
    state: WA
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
format:
  html: 
    out-width: "90%"
    fig-width: 9
    fig-asp: 0.618
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---
